title: Lu (disambiguation)
content:
'''Lu''' could refer to either of the following individuals:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Lu]], a [[Batuuan]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Lu Esi]], smuggler.
*[[Lu San]]
*[[Jambe Lu]], [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|AgriCorps]] member.
*[[Mi Fon Lu]], archaeologist

{{Disambig}}
